title: senecio candollei
intro: Senecio candollei, also known as the "ragwort," is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio candollei include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
